ruleToc.chapterList:
<js>
var n=result.match(/\d*\/(\d+)页\</)[1];
var list=[{k:'第1页',v:baseUrl}];
for(var i=2;i<=n;i++){
list.push({k:'第'+i+'页',v:baseUrl.replace(/\.txt/,'.txt&yeshu='+i)});
}
list
</js>

ruleBookInfo.author: [property$=author]@content
ruleBookInfo.intro: 🕰 更新时间： {{@@[property$=update_time]@content##\s.*}} 📜 内容简介： {{@@[property$=description]@content}}##(^|[。！？……；]+[”」）】]?)##$1
ruleBookInfo.lastChapter:
{{@@[property$=chapter_name]@content##正文卷.|正文.|VIP卷.|默认卷.|卷_|VIP章节.|免费章节.|章节目录.|最新章节.|[\(（【].*?[求含理更谢乐发推票盟补加字].*?[】）\)]}}•{{@@[property$=update_time]@content##\s.*}}
@js:result
.replace("••","")
.replace(/^(\d+).第/,'第')
.replace(/^(\d+)[、．]第.+章/,'第$1章')
.replace(/^(\d+)、\d+、/,'第$1章 ')
.replace(/^(\d+)、\d+/,'第$1章')
.replace(/^(第.+章)\s?\d+/,'$1')
.replace(/^(\d+)、/,'第$1章 ')
.replace(/^(第.+章)\s?第.+章/,'$1')
.replace(/第\s(.+)\s章/,'第$1章')
.replace(/.*(chapter|Chapter)\s?(\d+)\s?/,'$1 $2 ')
.replace(/\(.+\)/,'')
.replace(/\[|。/,'')
.replace(/第([零一二两三四五六七八九十百千]+)章/g,java.toNumChapter(result))
##(章)([^\s]+)(\s·)##$1 $2$3
ruleBookInfo.name: [property$=book_name]@content

ruleContent.content:
.nr_content@p@html##精华书阁.*最快更新.*最新章节.|.本章未完，请点击下一页.*|.*新笔趣阁.*|紧急通知.*收藏书签.|.*最快更新.*|.*免费阅读.*www.*|.*收藏书签方便.*|\&\;quot\;
@js:result+'下一页标识'

ruleSearch.author: .p3@text||.s4@text
ruleSearch.lastChapter:
{{@@.p2@text||.s3@text##正文卷.|正文.|VIP卷.|默认卷.|卷_|VIP章节.|免费章节.|章节目录.|最新章节.|[\(（【].*?[求含理更谢乐发推票盟补加字].*?[】）\)]}}•{{@@.p5@text||.s5@text##\s.*}}
@js:result
.replace("••","")
.replace(/^(\d+).第/,'第')
.replace(/^(\d+)[、．]第.+章/,'第$1章')
.replace(/^(\d+)、\d+、/,'第$1章 ')
.replace(/^(\d+)、\d+/,'第$1章')
.replace(/^(第.+章)\s?\d+/,'$1')
.replace(/^(\d+)、/,'第$1章 ')
.replace(/^(第.+章)\s?第.+章/,'$1')
.replace(/第\s(.+)\s章/,'第$1章')
.replace(/.*(chapter|Chapter)\s?(\d+)\s?/,'$1 $2 ')
.replace(/\(.+\)/,'')
.replace(/\[|。/,'')
.replace(/第([零一二两三四五六七八九十百千]+)章/g,java.toNumChapter(result))
##(章)([^\s]+)(\s·)##$1 $2$3
ruleSearch.name: .p1@text||.s2@text
